ActiveInitiative.Settings.damagePath.Hint: This is the path that points towards the HP value of an actor (standard DnD5e: system.attributes.hp.value)

ActiveInitiative.Settings.stealOnDamage.Hint: When a combatant takes damage they become able to steal the next turn

ActiveInitiative.Settings.damageOnIncrea.Hint: Enable this if your value counts UP when a combatant gets hurt (wound counters, for systems like swade)

ActiveInitiative.Notify.DefeatedReceive: Defeated combatants cannot receive the turn.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.TargetIsActive: The turn cannot be given to the active combatant.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.AlreadyActed: That combatant has already acted this round.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.InterruptPriorit: A queued interrupt takes priority: {name} acts next.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.ActedInterrupt: Combatants who have already acted cannot interrupt.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.NotEligible: That combatant is not eligible to interrupt.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.NotOwner: You can only interrupt with a combatant you own.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.NotYourTurn: You can only give the turn when it is your turn.
ActiveInitiative.Notify.NoGM: No GM is connected to handle turn requests.
ActiveInitiative.Buttons.SetActiveTitle: GM override: set as active combatant
ActiveInitiative.Buttons.GiveTurnTitle: Give the turn to this combatant
ActiveInitiative.Buttons.InterruptTitle: Interrupt: act next, after the current turn ends
